page_content:
Repeatable to: 12 credits.

ARTT426 Advanced Painting: Painting on Site | (3 Credits)

Designed for Art and design, architecture, urban planning, and public engagement majors seeking to gain more experience in the public art process. Through public artworks, students will explore ethical methods of community engagement, mural design and production. This course will have 1-2 visiting artists give lectures and/or participate in a workshop. Prerequisite: ARTT320; or permission of the Art Department.
